faq.cancelAnswer: Yes, you can cancel your subscription at any time. You'll continue to have access until the end of your billing period.

help.title: Help Center
help.subtitle: Find answers to common questions and get support
help.faq1a: We currently support PDF files only. Make sure your PDF contains selectable text - scanned documents may not work properly.
help.faq2a: Free users can upload PDFs up to 20MB. Pro users have access to larger file support (up to 50MB) and longer documents (up to 200 pages).
help.faq3q: How does the daily limit work?
help.faq3a: Free users get 5 PDF summaries per day. This limit resets at midnight (UTC). Pro users have unlimited access.
help.faq4q: Can I cancel my subscription anytime?
help.faq4a: Yes, you can cancel your subscription at any time through your billing portal. You'll continue to have access until the end of your billing period.
help.faq5a: Absolutely. All your documents are encrypted and processed securely. We never share your data with third parties. Uploaded files are automatically deleted after processing.
help.faq6q: What happens if my PDF upload fails?
help.faq6a: If your upload fails, please check: 1) The file is in PDF format, 2) The file size is under 20MB, 3) Your internet connection is stable. If problems persist, contact support.
help.faq7a: For very long documents, we process up to 15,000 characters. For complete summaries of lengthy PDFs, please upgrade to Pro.
help.faq8a: Pro users can export summaries in multiple formats including PDF and Word. Free users can copy the summary text directly.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.whatAreDesc: Cookies are small text files that are placed on your computer or mobile device when you visit our website. They help us provide you with a better experience and allow certain features to work properly.
cookies.essentialDesc: Required for the website to function properly. These include authentication cookies, security cookies, and cookies needed to remember your preferences.
cookies.analyticsDesc: Help us understand how visitors interact with our website by collecting anonymous information. This helps us improve our service.
cookies.authDesc: Used by Clerk (our authentication provider) to maintain your login session and securely authenticate you.
cookies.thirdPartyDesc: We use services from third parties that may also set cookies:
cookies.managingDesc: Most web browsers allow you to control cookies through their settings. However, disabling cookies may affect the functionality of our website.
cookies.updatesDesc: We may update this Cookie Policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page.
cookies.contactDesc: If you have questions about our use of cookies, please contact us at
